name: @pm/origin-suite
description: The composed-origin integration suite (issue #3, extends the spike's 18 assertions): plain HTTP against the composed origin — outside-in, no Worker internals. Runs against local cross-process dev (run-local.mjs) and, post-deploy, against the deployed origin (PM_ORIGIN + PM_EXPECT_BROTLI=1). Deliberately has no `test` script: `turbo run test` must stay green without dev servers.
